MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: j. michael matthews, esq., carlson, calladine & peterson llp, 415.391.8736, for plaintiffs alda and joe chan.
james brandan kraus, esq., zacks & freedman, 415.956.8100, for defendant denise leadbetter.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT DENISE LEADBETTER'S special MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. The anti-SLAPP motion to strike is denied. Defendant's conduct does not implicate CCP 425.16. Plaintiff's request for fees is denied. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
